assertions.reason: Targeted vitest coverage proved full agent-message forwarding begins after /attach and stops after /detach, with the detach confirmation preserved and no post-detach full message forwarded.
Targeted vitest coverage proved the bot auto-detaches only for the attached session and sends exactly one "Auto-detached: local input detected." notification.
Targeted vitest coverage proved concise turn-completed/input-required notifications are sent only for subscribed detached sessions and are suppressed for the currently attached session.

Vitest proved forwarded messages stay isolated per attached user, and an inline Node script against dist/bot-service.js proved prompt routing and approval responses stay scoped to each user's own session/request.

commands.command: cd "/data/dl/fschannel/bot" && npx vitest run src/bot-service.test.ts --reporter=verbose -t "forwards agent messages while attached and stops after detach|auto-detaches on local input events for the attached session only|sends lightweight notifications for previously attached sessions when not attached|keeps lightweight notifications isolated to subscribed users and sessions|suppresses lightweight notifications for the currently attached session|keeps forwarded messages isolated per attached user"
commands.observation: 6 targeted BotService tests passed: forwarding after attach/before detach, per-user forwarded isolation, auto-detach notification, detached lightweight notifications, notification isolation, and suppression while attached.

Inline validation script imported dist/bot-service.js, attached two unique users to two unique sessions, confirmed prompts routed to the matching session IDs, and confirmed y/n approval replies called sendApproval only for each matching request/session.

frictions.description: The targeted bot-service vitest invocation triggered shared/server/wrapper build steps before running the selected tests, adding setup time beyond the bot-service-specific guidance.
frictions.resolution: Allowed the local pre-test builds to finish and then continued with the targeted assertions; no real Feishu traffic was attempted.

summary: Validated 4 assigned bot-service assertions for the feishu-bot milestone; VAL-BOT-003, VAL-BOT-006, VAL-BOT-007, and VAL-BOT-009 all passed.
